upstream.name: NEP-145 storage management (minimal)
upstream.notes: U64 projected balances; no StorageBalance JSON / withdraw / refund.

honesty: NEP-145-lite: cumulative U64 deposit map, not full JSON StorageBalance.
PF keys by 32-byte account hash; sdk uses AccountId LookupMap.
Attached deposit drives storage_deposit via nativeValue / env::attached_deposit.
